notes: [New] Combat Power (CP) and creature levels (1–40) — strength shown in wild encounters, Storage, and Nexus combat
[New] Weave the Net — 12-stitch catch minigame replaces the hold-and-release sync bar; net launch and trap sequence polish after weaving
[New] Supply Beacon — deploy Tundra Pulse, Wildwood Pulse, or Charge Field at Supply Points for shared spawn boosts (shop + map)
[New] Hunter Charm — personal mobile lure with owner-only spawns; earn from level rewards, milestones, streaks, and quests
[Improvement] Storage screen fully redesigned — card grid, sort, full-screen detail with CP arc, appraisal sheet, evolve/candy bar
[Improvement] Legacy creature sprites redrawn for visual consistency
[Fix] AllowVehicleTypes whitelist now applies correctly when AllowInVehicle is disabled
